# Alvian Zachry Faturrahman

> Full Stack Engineer, Program Manager, Technical Lead, and Bootcamp Instructor based in Batam, Indonesia.

## Who I Am

Alvian Zachry Faturrahman (also known as Alvian or Ary) is a software engineer with 13+ years of experience spanning full-stack development, engineering leadership, technical hiring, and developer education.

He bridges the gap between people and technology — building software products, mentoring junior developers, and placing senior engineers with European tech companies.

## What I Do

- **Full Stack Engineering**: React, TypeScript, Node.js, Express.js, Laravel, Python, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS, GCP, Docker
- **Program Management**: Leading cross-functional engineering teams, roadmap planning, sprint facilitation
- **Technical Hiring**: Recruiting senior developers for European partner companies via Devshore Partners; 60% shortlist-to-interview efficiency, 50% interview-to-offer rate
- **Mentorship & Education**: Mock technical interviews, fundamentals coaching, and bootcamp instruction at Hacktiv8 and LearnWithAndi
- **Open Source**: Published npm packages including `make-it-rain` and `react-worm-background`

## Current Roles

- **Talent Acquisition Specialist & Regional Manager** — Devshore Partners, s.r.o. (Oct 2023–Present)
- **Fullstack Engineer** — TiketQ (Jun 2023–Present), a Batam-based ticketing platform built from scratch

## Career History (Selected)

- Fullstack Engineer at TiketQ — built entire tech stack with Express.js, Redis, and React
- Program Manager & Technical Lead at Hacktiv8 — managed bootcamp cohorts, taught full-stack curriculum
- Various senior engineering roles across fintech, e-commerce, and SaaS products in Indonesia and Southeast Asia

## Technical Skills

**Languages**: JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, PHP, SQL
**Frontend**: React.js, Next.js, Vue.js, Tailwind CSS
**Backend**: Node.js, Express.js, Laravel, CodeIgniter
**Databases**: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Firestore
**Cloud & DevOps**: AWS, GCP, Docker, Nginx, Linux
**Other**: System architecture, REST API design, technical assessment design, Agile/Scrum

## Soft Skills

Leadership, Mentorship, Technical Hiring, Cross-cultural Collaboration, Public Speaking, Curriculum Design

## Mentorship

Alvian offers mock technical interviews and career coaching at [learnwithandi.com](https://learnwithandi.com). The sessions focus on:
- Interview communication
- Fundamentals deep-dive
- Problem-solving approach
- Brutally honest feedback
